title: Fit test - 2nd screen Fail and Cancel
scenario: Verify that tapping Cancel or failing the fit test on the second screen closes the fit test and returns to Device Settings, and that pressing Cancel again after the test is closed behaves correctly.
steps: 2. Navigate to the fit test screen.
3. On the second screen of the fit test, tap 'Cancel'.
4. Observe that the fit test screen closes and returns to the Device Settings screen.
5. From the Device Settings screen, tap 'Cancel' again.
6. Verify the behavior of pressing Cancel again after the test is closed.
expected: Tapping "Cancel" on the second screen of the fit test closes the fit test screen and returns the user to the Device Settings screen. Pressing Cancel again after the test is closed should behave correctly (e.g., no crash, no unexpected navigation).
